basic_details.job_title: VNIT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT) has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Assistant position. Candidates holding an M.A. in Sanskrit with NET/ SET in Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS) and working knowledge of Hindi and Marathi are eligible to apply online. A Ph.D. in Sanskrit is desirable. The application process is open until 22 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

qualification.education_qualification: MA Sanskrit and NET/ SET in IKS with working knowledge of Hindi and Marathi, PhD in Sanskrit (desired)
qualification.details: MA Sanskrit and NET/SET in IKS with working knowledge of Hindi and Marathi. PhD in Sanskrit is desired.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the VNIT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNIT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download VNIT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the VNIT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download VNIT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: MA Sanskrit and NET/SET in IKS with working knowledge of Hindi and Marathi. PhD in Sanskrit is desired.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the VNIT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNIT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VNIT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the VNIT Project Assistant position is 22nd July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MA in Sanskrit and have cleared NET/SET in IKS. Working knowledge of Hindi and Marathi is also essential. A PhD in Sanskrit is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position as per the official notification released by VNIT.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for VNIT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role at VNIT?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the VNIT Project Assistant recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at VNIT is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where is VNIT located?
faq.answer: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT) is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440010.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply?
faq.answer: The notification invites applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. It is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state-related requirements.
